gmail.tokenExpiredHint: Token may have expired. Re-auth with `scripts/auth-google.mjs <email>`
gmail.clickForDetail: Click to open in new window
gmail.standby: Click an email to view details

calendar.noEventsToday: No events today. Take a break

skills.description: Enable or disable individual skills. Tools belonging to a disabled skill are hidden from the AI.

appearance.description: Adjust the size of the floating robot and its window.

google.description: Connect Google accounts to use Gmail / Calendar / Drive. You can add or remove multiple accounts.
google.adding: Complete the sign-in in your browser…
google.removeConfirm:
Disconnect {{email}}?
The Google-side authorization will also be revoked.
google.noClientSecret:
client_secret.json not found.
Create a "Desktop app" OAuth client in the Google Cloud Console and save the downloaded JSON to:

language.description: Switch the UI and Vega's conversation language.

profile.description: Your information Vega references during conversation. Say 'My name is ...' to update automatically.

apps.description: Set the app to open when you say 'open email' or 'open browser' by category. Specific names (e.g. 'Google Chrome') are opened directly.

api.restartRequired: Restart the app to apply changes
api.googleAuthNote: Google auth (Gmail / Calendar) is configured in .env.local

memory.description: What Vega has learned and remembered from your conversations. Edit procedures, facts, preferences, and ongoing topics. Profile (personal info) is in a separate tab.
memory.proceduresDescription: Steps Vega replays when you ask for a known action. Auto-added when Vega learns; you can also edit them by hand.
memory.procedureDescPlaceholder: Concrete steps — include URLs, exact commands, app names so future-Vega can re-execute
memory.preferencesDescription: Preferences Vega uses to match your communication style.
memory.resetConfirm: This wipes all procedures, facts, preferences, and topics. (Profile is preserved.) Continue?

setup.subtitle: Verify required permissions and API keys
setup.missingBoth: Microphone permission and Gemini API key are required

mic.label: Microphone
mic.notDetermined: Click OK when the dialog appears

screen.label: Screen Recording
screen.denied: Allow in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Screen Recording
screen.notDetermined: Open Settings and allow Robot Secretary

accessibility.label: Accessibility (PTT hotkey)
accessibility.denied: Cannot use Option key for voice input

settingsPanel.title: Settings
settingsPanel.googleNote: Google auth (Gmail/Calendar) is configured in .env file

connection.noApiKey: Gemini API key is not set. Right-click → Settings to enter it.
connection.authError: Auth error ({{code}}). API key may be invalid or expired.
connection.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Grant Robot Secretary microphone access in System Settings and restart.
